ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the configuration parameter */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance level of the configuration parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_documentations" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration documentation */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration parameter */,
  "doc_text" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration version */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment in which the configuration is applied */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter in the specific environment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who updated the configuration */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment in which the alert occurred */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration parameter involved in the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue or misconfiguration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has access */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment to which access is granted */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission granted (e.g., read, write, modify) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment in which the change was made */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration parameter involved in the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)
